name: Computation
description: Inefficiencies caused by unnecessary, repeated, or inefficient computation.

name: Data
description: Inefficiencies in data access, query behavior, data transfer, persistence, and lifecycle.

name: Networking
description: Inefficiencies caused by communication patterns, transport overhead, retries, and payload design.

name: Storage
description: Inefficiencies related to storage growth, retention, archival, and storage-tier misuse.

name: Concurrency
description: Inefficiencies caused by thread, process, queue, lock, or async misuse.

name: AI/ML
description: Inefficiencies in model choice, inference, training, embeddings, token usage, and accelerator utilization.

name: Architecture
description: Structural inefficiencies in system design, service boundaries, scaling, and resource topology.

name: Operations
description: Operational inefficiencies in observability, deployment, CI/CD, support, and recurring platform activity.

name: Infrastructure
description: Inefficiencies in compute, containers, cloud resources, provisioning, and platform configuration.

name: Organizational
description: Governance, policy, lifecycle, and accountability inefficiencies that institutionalize waste.
